occupation_definition: Edit moving images on film, video, or other media. May work with a producer or director to organize images for final production. May edit or synchronize soundtracks with images. Excludes “Sound Engineering Technicians” (27-4014).

breadcrumb.occupation_title: Arts, Design, Entertainment, Sports, and Media Occupations
Television, Video, and Film Camera Operators and Editors

siblings.occupation_title: Camera Operators, Television, Video, and Film
